_comment: MISAKA Testnet manifest — consumed by scripts/testnet-join.sh, launcher tools, and the /api/get_chain_info RPC for consistency checks. Kept in-sync with Cargo workspace version (currently 0.9.0).
stateCommitment: Sparse Merkle Tree (SMT) — MISAKA:state_root:v5, live since v0.9.0

seedNodes._comment: Populated by the operator announce. Before the announce these entries are placeholders; clients that see a blank seed list should wait for the operator announce (Discord #testnet-announce) before attempting to join.

bridge._comment: Solana devnet bridge. Program ID / mint carry over from v0.5.x and are still valid.

faucet._note: Faucet is enabled on operator seeds but disabled on participant nodes by default. See config/validator.toml [faucet].enabled.

consensusParams._blockTimeNote: FAST_LANE_BLOCK_TIME_SECS — raised from 2 → 10 in v0.8.9 for storage efficiency
consensusParams._epochLengthNote: Roughly 1 hour at 10 s/block; final value confirmed at announce
consensusParams._minStakeNote: 100,000 MSK in base units (1 MSK = 10^6 base); testnet distributes via faucet
consensusParams._unbondingNote: Testnet value; mainnet uses much longer period (separate bug tracked in docs/issues/)

storage._pruneModeNote: Default; users may opt into Pruned { keep_rounds = N } — see JOIN_TESTNET.md §3

ports._rpcNote: Loopback (127.0.0.1) only — DO NOT expose publicly without reverse proxy + Bearer auth
ports._legacyP2pNote: Fallback only; real listener comes from genesis_committee.toml network_address

supportChannels._comment: Concrete URLs / invites get filled at announce time
